# GB/T 43XXX-2025

**ICS 31.260  CCS L 46**

---

# 车载有机发光显示器件 第1部分：通用规范

*Automotive organic light-emitting display devices -- Part 1: General specification*

---

**Issue date:** 2025-06-01

**Implementation date:** 2025-12-01

**Issued by:** State Administration for Market Regulation / National Standardization Administration

---

## Introduction

Automotive OLED displays have rapidly evolved to provide enhanced performance for instrument clusters and center-stack infotainment systems.

This document establishes common requirements and test methods to ensure interoperability and quality assurance.

---

## 1  Scope

This document specifies the general requirements, performance criteria, and test methods for organic light-emitting display (OLED) devices used in automotive applications.

This document is applicable to active-matrix OLED (AMOLED) display modules with diagonal sizes from 2 inches to 20 inches intended for use in automotive instrument clusters, central information displays, and head-up displays.

---

## 2  Normative references

The following documents are referred to in the text in such a way that some or all of their content constitutes requirements of this document. For dated references, only the edition cited applies. For undated references, the latest edition of the referenced document (including any amendments) applies.

- GB/T 321-2005  Preferred numbers -- Series of preferred numbers

- GB/T 2421-2020  Environmental testing for electric and electronic products

- GB/T 7714-2015  Information and documentation -- Rules for bibliographic references

---

## 3  Terms and definitions

For the purposes of this document, the following terms and definitions apply.

**3.1  有机发光显示器件**

*organic light-emitting display device*

以有机发光材料为发光层的平板显示器件，通过电流驱动有机薄膜发光

**3.2  亮度**

*luminance*

在指定方向上单位面积的发光强度

**3.3  对比度**

*contrast ratio*

显示器件最大亮度与最小亮度之比

---

## 4  Symbols and abbreviations

- OLED -- Organic Light-Emitting Diode

- AMOLED -- Active-Matrix OLED

- HUD -- Head-Up Display

- T_a -- Ambient temperature (degrees Celsius)

---

## 5  General requirements

5.1 The OLED display device shall comply with all requirements specified in this document.
5.2 The display shall operate within the ambient temperature range of -40 C to +85 C.
5.3 All materials used shall be RoHS compliant.

---

## 6  Optical performance requirements

6.1 Luminance
The minimum luminance of the display under normal operating conditions shall not be less than 1000 cd/m2.

6.2 Contrast ratio
The contrast ratio shall be not less than 100000:1 (full-on/full-off).

6.3 Color gamut
The color gamut coverage shall be not less than 90 percent of the DCI-P3 color space.

---

## 7  Environmental and reliability requirements

7.1 Temperature storage
The display shall withstand storage at -40 C to +90 C for 240 hours without functional degradation.

7.2 Humidity resistance
The display shall withstand 85 percent relative humidity at 60 C for 500 hours.

---

## Annex A
(normative)

### Test equipment specifications

A.1 Luminance meter
The luminance meter used for photometric measurements shall comply with CIE 69:1987 and have a measurement uncertainty of less than 2 percent.

---

## Annex B
(informative)

### Application guidance for instrument cluster integration

This annex provides guidance (not requirements) on integrating OLED displays into automotive instrument cluster assemblies.

---
